title: 5" Bricklayers Trowel Pointed | Carbon Steel Blade with Wooden Handle | Masonry, Plastering & Brickwork Tool (125mm)
features: DURABLE CARBON STEEL BLADE – Strong pointed blade designed for long-lasting performance in bricklaying, plastering, and masonry work.
COMFORTABLE WOODEN HANDLE – Smooth wooden handle provides a secure and comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue during extended use.
PRECISION POINTED DESIGN – Ideal for detailed work, spreading mortar, and achieving clean finishes in tight spaces.
COMPACT SIZE (5"/125MM) – Handy and lightweight, making it easy to carry and perfect for smaller bricklaying or repair tasks.
VERSATILE MASONRY TOOL – Suitable for bricklayers, plasterers, builders, and DIY enthusiasts for everyday construction and repair jobs.
description: This 5" (125mm) Bricklayers Trowel is a reliable and durable tool, crafted with a strong pointed carbon steel blade and a comfortable wooden handle. Designed for professional tradesmen as well as DIY users, it is ideal for spreading mortar, plaster, and cement with precision. The compact size makes it especially useful for smaller jobs, detailed work, and tight spaces where larger trowels are less effective. A must-have tool for bricklayers, plasterers, and builders, offering both strength and comfort for everyday masonry tasks.
